review_text: App crashes every time I try to open the settings page. Started after the latest update. Using Pixel 7 on Android 14.
Absolutely love this app! The new task scheduling feature is a game changer. Been using it daily for 3 months.
Can't login since the last update. I've tried resetting my password three times but still get 'Authentication Failed' error.
Great app overall but would love to see a dark mode option. My eyes hurt using it at night.
Data sync is completely broken. My tasks on phone don't match what's on the web. Lost 2 hours of work!
Works perfectly for managing my team's projects. The collaboration features are top notch!
Please add calendar integration with Google Calendar. I have to manually copy events which is frustrating.
App is extremely slow since version 3.2. Takes 10+ seconds to load the dashboard. iPhone 14 Pro, iOS 17.3.
Would be great to have recurring task templates. I create the same tasks every Monday and it's tedious.
The app logged me out and lost all my local data. This is unacceptable for a productivity app!
Just what I needed! Simple, fast, and reliable. The widget on my home screen is super convenient.
Push notifications stopped working completely. I missed 3 important deadlines because of this bug.
The app is okay but really needs offline mode. I travel frequently and can't always rely on internet.
Too expensive for what it offers. $9.99/month when competitors charge half that. Considering switching.
App freezes when attaching files larger than 5MB. Tried with PDF and images. Samsung Galaxy S24, Android 14.
Love the app! Would be amazing if you could add Slack integration for task notifications.
Been using this for a year now. Best productivity app on the market. The team view is fantastic!
Search function returns completely wrong results. Searched for 'budget' and got tasks about 'meetings'.
Missing functionality for subtasks. Would be very helpful to break down larger tasks into smaller steps.
Customer service is terrible. Submitted a bug report 2 weeks ago and still no response. Very disappointed.

Please add the ability to export tasks to PDF. Need this for my weekly reports to management.
App crashes on startup after updating to v3.2.1. Have to reinstall every time. OnePlus 12, Android 14.
The new collaboration update is brilliant! Sharing tasks with my team has never been easier.
Notification badges show wrong count. Shows 5 unread but I only have 1. Very confusing and annoying.
Would love to see Siri shortcuts integration for quick task creation. That would be a killer feature!
The app needs better sorting options. Can only sort by date, but I need to sort by priority and project.
Poor accessibility support. VoiceOver reads buttons incorrectly and some elements are not labelled.
